meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome no project ideas. An intermediate-level guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. The most effective way to overcome project paralysis is to build a micro-SaaS that solves a singular, recurring pain point. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you can automate a niche utility that generates passive income while building a high-value portfolio.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the graveyard of ambition. You sit down, fingers hovering over the keys, waiting for a spark of genius that never comes. This isn't a lack of talent—it's a lack of constraints. When you lack a clear problem to solve, your code becomes aimless, and your portfolio remains empty.

But what if you stopped searching for the 'next big thing' and started building the 'next boring thing'? By shifting your focus to passive income, you gain a North Star: utility. When your goal is to create a tool that saves a user five minutes, your project scope crystallizes, and your technical skills sharpen. Let’s turn your idle time into an automated asset.

steps.title: Identify a High-Intent Niche
steps.description: Find a small, underserved community on Reddit or Twitter. Look for recurring questions like 'How do I automate X?' or 'Is there an API for Y?'
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these 50 scraped tweets for recurring technical pain points that can be solved with a micro-SaaS utility. Rank them by ease of implementation vs. potential for recurring subscription revenue.
steps.claude_code_command: claude search 'market research for micro-saas ideas' --depth 2

steps.title: Architect the Minimum Viable Asset
steps.description: Define the simplest version of your tool that provides immediate value. Focus on a single endpoint or a single automation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a system architecture diagram for a serverless micro-SaaS that performs a specific API-based task. Use a tech stack of Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe.
steps.claude_code_command: claude plan 'create a project structure for a Next.js app with Stripe integration'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the core logic. Never write boilerplate manually; focus on the unique value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic handler for an automated task processor. Include error handling and rate limiting for external API calls.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the core service logic for the API handler with robust error handling'

steps.title: Deploy and Automate
steps.description: Push your code to production using Vercel. Ensure your deployment pipeline is automated so you don't have to touch it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment of a Next.js application to Vercel.

steps.title: Monetization Integration
steps.description: Hook up Stripe to your application. Make the payment flow invisible and frictionless.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe checkout session handler in TypeScript for a monthly subscription model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'add Stripe webhook listener and subscription checkout logic'

pro_tips: Focus on 'utility-first' tools; if a user has to think about how to use your app, they won't pay for it.
Use 'Copy-Paste' architecture: find successful micro-SaaS GitHub repos and study their folder structure.
Don't build a database if a JSON file in S3 works for your MVP; keep infrastructure costs near zero.
Set up automated error logging with Sentry immediately; you need to know when your passive income stream breaks.
Market your tool to the exact thread where you found the problem; this is the highest-converting form of traffic.
content.next_steps: Once your first tool is live, track your conversion metrics for 30 days. Then, iterate by adding one feature requested by your first three paying users.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop dreaming and start shipping. Don't let another weekend pass with nothing to show for it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
